_comment: Canonical provenance registry for WikiLean's formal<->informal graph. The SINGLE source of truth for every database WikiLean links to: where OUR data comes from, under what license, and which layer of the formal<->informal stack it sits in. fetch_crossrefs.py derives its property map from `crossref_sources` here; the graph/atlas UIs and the /api surfaces render `layers` + these entries as a transparent 'sources' legend. HAND-CURATED. `our_provenance` (how WikiLean obtained the link) is authoritative and verified; `target_license` (the linked project's own content license) is best-effort — VERIFY each before any public 'sources' page claims it.

our_data_license.note: WikiLean's own annotation + graph data is CC0. Linked-target CONTENT stays under each project's own license (below); we store only identifiers/edges, which are facts.

layers.informal: Natural-language mathematics — encyclopedias & reference works keyed by concept.
layers.formal: Machine-checked / formal-library statements keyed by declaration or theorem id.
layers.literature: Primary literature & sequence/object databases (arXiv, OEIS, LMFDB objects).
layers.classification: Topic/taxonomy overlays (MSC) — never an identity join, a subject tag.
layers.bridge: Cross-database identity hubs (Wikidata QID, Google KG mid) — the join spine itself.

spine.name: Wikidata
spine.our_provenance: The QID is the only cross-database join key in mathematics (no federated math SPARQL exists). Every WikiLean concept node IS a Wikidata QID; every crossref below is a property on that QID.
spine.note: All crossref identifiers below are read from Wikidata (CC0), never scraped from the target site.

wikipedia.name: Wikipedia (English)
wikipedia.kind: The informal source article each concept annotates.
wikipedia.our_provenance: Article text + section anchors pinned per-revision; concept node = the article's Wikidata sitelink.

mathlib.name: Mathlib 4
mathlib.kind: The primary formal declaration for a concept (node.primary_decl / module).
mathlib.our_provenance: Read from the local mathlib4 checkout + doc-gen4 declaration data; the @[wikidata] tag program contributes the human-reviewed decl<->QID pairs upstream (also Wikidata property P14534).

mathlib_deps.name: Mathlib declaration dependencies
mathlib_deps.kind: A formal dependency between two concepts, lifted from decl->decl uses in Mathlib to QID->QID.
mathlib_deps.our_provenance: catalog/mathlib_deps/mathlib_edges.tsv (decl dep graph) x decl_to_qid.json; edge carries the witnessing [decl_a, decl_b] pairs. source='mathlib'.

wikidata_props.name: Wikidata concept relations
wikidata_props.kind: An informal/ontological relation between two concepts (subclass-of, part-of, ...).
wikidata_props.our_provenance: catalog/mathlib_deps/wikidata_edges.jsonl; edge carries the witnessing property [P#, label]. source='wikidata'.

lmfdb_knowl.name: LMFDB (knowl)
lmfdb_knowl.note: P12987 (verified 2026-07-02 as LMFDB's ONLY Wikidata property) identifies knowls — LMFDB's documentation entries — so it links at the CONCEPT level. There is still no Wikidata property for LMFDB object labels (e.g. an elliptic curve's `11.a1`), so concept→object joins to LMFDB aren't yet expressible on Wikidata (the LeanBridge cross-check gap).

oeis.name: OEIS
oeis.target_license: OEIS end-user license (attribution, non-commercial reuse) — verify

dlmf.name: DLMF
dlmf.target_license: NIST DLMF (US Gov, free use w/ attribution) — verify

msc.name: MSC 2020
msc.note: A subject overlay, NOT an identity join — used only for atlas continent/subfield assignment.

mathlib.name: Mathlib Declaration ID
mathlib.our_provenance: Wikidata P14534 (CC0) — WikiLean's own property (created by Jack; seeded from the 126 human-reviewed merged @[wikidata] tags). The node xref key is `mathlib` (matches fetch_crossrefs.py); resolved through our own /decl so reverse citations ride along.

kgmid.name: Google Knowledge Graph
kgmid.our_provenance: Wikidata P2671 (/g/ form) + P646 (Freebase form), both CC0.
kgmid.note: CRITICAL: the kgmid is sourced from WIKIDATA (CC0), NEVER from Google's Knowledge Graph API — Google ToS §5.e forbids building a database from that API. Link/bridge only.

formal_conjectures.name: FormalConjectures
formal_conjectures.kind: Open-problem frontier: formalized conjecture STATEMENTS (proof_wanted) mapped to QIDs; dashed 'shoreline' nodes on the map.
formal_conjectures.our_provenance: catalog/ingest_formal_conjectures.py over the FC repo; 342 statements -> 114 QIDs (101 new frontier nodes). 'research solved' != proved.

wikilean_tags.name: WikiLean @[wikidata] tags
wikilean_tags.kind: The human-reviewed decl<->QID pairs WikiLean's bot upstreams into Mathlib (the ground-truth seed for P14534).
wikilean_tags.our_provenance: bot/ pipeline; 126 merged as of 2026-07; each is a gated, human-reviewed PR.
